title: Turkish Pide Bread with Hazelnut Topping
description: A delicious Turkish flatbread topped with a rich and nutty hazelnut mixture, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine warm water and yeast. Let it sit for 5-7 minutes, until yeast is activated.
Add flour, salt, and Turkish pide spice blend to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10-12 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1-2 hours.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle.
Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Mix together hazelnuts, honey, and a pinch of salt. Spread the mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, until the crust is golden brown and the topping is caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
